name: SolvoHQ/web3-discover
description: Curated directory of 32 active crypto airdrops with per-wallet eligibility checks across 7 chains (Ethereum, Base, Linea, Arbitrum, Polygon, BSC, Solana). 3 tools — `list_active_airdrops` (filter by chain/risk/deadline), `get_airdrop` (full details, action steps, cost floor), `check_wallet` (multi-chain eligibility scan). Hosted HTTP MCP at `https://web3-discover.vercel.app/api/mcp` — no install, no auth, CORS-open.
